name: @jeremiewerner/motto
description: Framework for authoring, validating, and packaging Claude Code Agent Skills
author: Jérémie Werner

scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let c=fs.readFileSync('motto.yaml','utf8'); c=c.replace(/^version: .+$/m,'version: \"'+process.env.npm_new_version+'\"'); fs.writeFileSync('motto.yaml',c);" && git add motto.yaml
